title: Delivery Tags, Acknowledgements, and Redelivery · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs delivery tags, acknowledgements, and redelivery from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a same-channel terminal delivery decision record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Acknowledge, nack, or reject a delivery exactly once on its owning channel and prevent stale or cross-channel tag use; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Transfer ownership only after the intended durable effect, transactional inbox record, or safely repeatable handoff succeeds; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff · changed case · Review Manual Auto Ack Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 6557 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce same-generation exactly-one terminal delivery decision after durable effect; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then introduce a keyed sequence gap during single-active failover. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose manual or automatic acknowledgement from loss tolerance, consumer memory, work duration, and effect ownership; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce same-generation exactly-one terminal delivery decision after durable effect; separate deterministic browser proof from race-enabled and live-broker evidence; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use one terminal delivery decision owner to prevent timeout, abort, handler, and shutdown paths from double acknowledging or conflicting; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Ack Race Single Owner, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Calling ack twice is idempotent and safely ignored by RabbitMQ. In Go, delivery tags are globally reusable after reconnect.
